name: Mecha Phantom Beast Raiten
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ライテン
desc: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 "Mecha Phantom Beast Token" (Machine/WIND/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0), also you can only use "Mecha Phantom Beast" monsters as Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Material for a Summon, for the rest of this turn. This card's Level is increased by the total Levels of all "Mecha Phantom Beast Tokens" you control. While you control a Token, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
